subcodes.first_line: The remembrance of God from the sacred Lote-Tree hath verily been witnessed upon the right hand of the Throne. Blessed, then, is he who draweth nigh unto it and attaineth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر الله من سدره القدس قد کان عن یمین العرش مشهودا فطوبی لمن استقرب الیها و رزق
subcodes.subjects: @thankfulness; gratitude, @Manifestation of God as tree of life; sadratu'l-muntaha, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
